name: He was feeling thirsty
description:
Jimmy lactation bot anyone?

Role reversal!!🔗

I think it’s criminal that there’s not even one bot of this yet ;(

TW/CW: Jimmy, possible dubcon/cnc, lactation, possible agegap (user is 18+!)

Inspired by this (homelander)

This is my own little au where Jimmy is literally just a grumpy rude guy who likes to be nonchalant… so no crash and he never hurt Anya :p

It’ll also have some of my own headcanons for him and is more than likely going to be ooc, but it’s Jimmy so is it really bad if it is?

User can be anything! You can also choose the reason why user is lactating, anything works (you can SO be a milf)

Tags: Jimmy, mouthwashing, lactation, lactating, Tulpar, Pony Express
creator: Mewoski
